headline: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 5 with expanded capabilities
body: Anthropic launched Claude Opus 5, marking a significant capability jump in their flagship model. For healthcare AI applications, the model's improved reasoning and expanded context window directly impact clinical documentation automation, EHR integration complexity, and real-time clinical decision support systems. The release reduces token costs through optimizations like RTK (Retrieval Token Kit), which improves economics for high-volume healthcare deployments processing patient records and clinical literature. Healthcare AI vendors and health systems evaluating large language models now have a materially stronger alternative for regulated use cases requiring documented reasoning and compliance audit trails.
